sourceTitle: Frequently asked questions about generative AI at Sydney
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Clause 5(16) (2) mentions that students may only use assistance, including automated writing tools, if the unit of study outline expressly permits it. (5)(b) mentions that students must acknowledge assistance provided when preparing submitted work, including the use of automated writing tools.
evidenceLocator: The policy and assessment frameworks section, 'What is in the policy about generative AI use by students?'
